LanguageData.Diplomat.description: Casino hosts look after patrons, smooth over problems, and build goodwill with visiting parties.
LanguageData.GuestRoom.label: guest suite
LanguageData.AreaToStayTooltip: This is where guests may sleep and unwind between games, meals, and tours.
LanguageData.Hospitality_VendingMachineToggleDesc: Allow patrons to use this amenity.
LanguageData.CommandBedSetAsGuestDesc: Whether this bed is reserved for paying guests.
LanguageData.BedSatisfiedTitles: These titles will accept this suite:
LanguageData.VisitorsLeavingGreat: They were dazzled by the standards of your establishment. (Score: {1})
LanguageData.VisitorsLeavingGood: They enjoyed their stay and left impressed with the house. (Score: {1})
LanguageData.VisitorsLeavingBad: The house failed to impress them. (Score: {1})
LanguageData.VisitorsLeavingAwful: They left convinced this place falls well short of proper casino standards. (Score: {1})
LanguageData.TryRecruitTooltip: Your casino hosts will try to introduce this patron to your colonists and build lasting goodwill. Skilled hosts are more effective, while poor hosts may sour the mood.
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.0.label: complimentary suite
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.0.description: The suite was complimentary, so there is little to complain about.
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.4.label: fairly priced suite
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.5.label: good value suite
LanguageData.GuestClaimedBed.stages.6.label: excellent suite value
LanguageData.GuestExpensiveFood.stages.expensive_food: I had to pay dearly for refreshments from the house.
LanguageData.GuestCheapFood.stages.cheap_food.descrip: I could buy refreshments at a respectable price.
LanguageData.GuestHasNoFood.stages.no_food.label: no refreshments
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.no_guest_beds.label: no guest suites
LanguageData.CharmGuest.reportString: Introducing TargetA to your colonists and regulars.
LanguageData.GuestImproveRelationship.reportString: Trying to improve the house's standing with TargetA's faction.
LanguageData.trans: When a group of visitors arrives, they will use your leisure amenities, sleep in guest suites, and buy items in their allowed area.\n\nIf they enjoy the house, this will improve your standing with their faction.
LanguageData.GuestsWelcomeTooltip: If you turn this off, no new patron parties will arrive at this colony.
